ruleBookInfo.coverUrl:
<js>
//从豆瓣获取封面
var pic="";
let j=JSON.parse(java.ajax("https://book.douban.com/j/subject_suggest?q="+book.name));
j.map(o=>{
if(o.title==book.name){pic=o.pic}
});
if(pic.length<3&&j.length>0){
pic=j[0].pic;
}
result=pic
//java.log(result)
</js>

<js>
//try{
lz=source.getVariable();
list="";
//获取需要显示的内容，分割为数组
if(/forum/.test(baseUrl)){
zuozhe=java.getString("td[rowspan='2']@div.0@a@text").split("\n");
shijian=java.getString(".authorinfo em@text").split("\n");
neir=java.getString(".postmessage@tr@td@ownText").split("\n");
}
if(/books/.test(baseUrl)){	zuozhe=java.getString("@@.noveltitle@p.0@text").split("\n");
shijian=java.getString(".noveltitle@p.0@text").split("\n");
neir=java.getString(".novelcontent@ownText").split("\n");
}

//修整内容后依次拼接
for(i=0;i<zuozhe.length;i++){
txt=String(neir[i]).replace(/\s/g,"\n");
zz=String(zuozhe[i]).replace(/ 发表.*/,"");
sj=String(shijian[i]).replace(/.*发表/,"发表");
java.log(zz+lz);

//只看楼主
if (book.getVariable("custom")!=""){
  if(zz==lz){
  list=list+"\n@"+zz+"__"+sj+"\n"+txt+"\n————\n";
  }else{};
}else{list=list+"\n@"+zz+"__"+sj+"\n"+txt+"\n————\n";}
}
list
if(list==""){"未获取到内容，或许是因为“只看楼主”功能开启中\n请尝试在详情页点击右上角删除书籍变量，关闭只看楼主功能后刷新本页面"}
//}catch {"代码错误"}
</js>

bookSourceComment:
Pixiv 小说（更新📆：2025/12/28）

书源版本：255
使用说明：📌阅读 Beta 新包名 3.25.1224 版本可用
可用功能：✅搜索✅发现✅添加网址✅订阅源
搜索小说：✅单篇✅系列✅标签✅作者
发现小说：✅关注✅追更✅推荐✅发现
发现小说：✅收藏✅书签✅首页✅排行
添加网址：✅小说✅系列✅作者
订阅用法：点击订阅源打开小说/系列小说，【刷新】，点击【加入书架】按钮，添加到书架

书源发布：Pixiv 书源频道 https://t.me/PixivSource
项目地址：https://github.com/DowneyRem/PixivSource
使用教程：https://downeyrem.github.io/PixivSource/Pixiv

旧版书源：
https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/DowneyRem/PixivSource@191/pixiv.json
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DowneyRem/PixivSource/191/pixiv.json

规则订阅：import 订阅源
https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/DowneyRem/PixivSource@main/import.json
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DowneyRem/PixivSource/main/import.json

⚙️ 书源设置：
设置1️⃣：打开小说 - 菜单 - 登录 - 点击下方按钮
设置2️⃣：编辑书源 - 基本 - 变量说明 - 修改并保存

🚫 屏蔽作者(本地)：
▶️设置方法：打开小说 - 菜单 - 登录 - 🚫 屏蔽作者

🚫 屏蔽标签/描述(本地)：
1️⃣编辑书源：菜单 - 登录 - 点击【 👀 查看屏蔽】
2️⃣切换列表：点击按钮，切换至【相应屏蔽列表】
3️⃣输入内容：在【输入内容】处输入屏蔽内容
4️⃣屏蔽作者：点击【🚫 加入屏蔽】，屏蔽该内容

📌 喜欢标签(本地)：
1️⃣编辑书源：菜单 - 登录 ，找到输入内容
2️⃣输入内容：输入标签，点击【📌 喜欢标签】

❤️ 查看他人收藏：
1️⃣编辑书源：菜单 - 登录 ，找到输入内容
2️⃣输入内容：输入作者ID，点击【❤️ 他人收藏】

@js:
let SHOW_R18_GENRE, SHOW_GENERAL_NEW, SHOW_GENERAL_RANK, SHOW_GENERAL_GENRE
try {
    settings = JSON.parse(String(source.variableComment).match(RegExp(/{([\s\S]*?)}/gm)))
    SHOW_R18_GENRE = settings.SHOW_R18_GENRE         // 发现：热门分类显示R18小说
    SHOW_GENERAL_NEW = settings.SHOW_GENERAL_NEW     // 发现：最新、企划、约稿显示一般小说
    SHOW_GENERAL_RANK = settings.SHOW_GENERAL_RANK   // 发现：排行榜显示一般小说
    SHOW_GENERAL_GENRE = settings.SHOW_GENERAL_GENRE // 发现：热门分类显示一般小说
} catch (e) {
    SHOW_R18_GENRE = false
    SHOW_GENERAL_NEW = false
    SHOW_GENERAL_RANK = false
    SHOW_GENERAL_GENRE = false
}

]

    {"🏠 主页": "https://downeyrem.github.io/PixivSource"},
    {"🔰 指南": "https://downeyrem.github.io/PixivSource/Pixiv"},
    {"🐞 反馈": "https://github.com/DowneyRem/PixivSource/issues"},
    {"💰 打赏": "https://downeyrem.github.io/PixivSource/Sponsor"},
]

let likeTagLinks = [{"📌 喜欢标签 📌":""}]
let othersBookmarks = [{"❤️ 他人收藏 ❤️": ""}]

li = li.concat(normal)
li = li.concat(r18New)
if (SHOW_GENERAL_NEW) li = li.concat(generalNew)
li = li.concat(r18Rank)
if (SHOW_GENERAL_RANK) li = li.concat(generalRank)
if (SHOW_R18_GENRE) li = li.concat(r18Genre)
if (SHOW_GENERAL_GENRE) li = li.concat(generalGenre)
sleepToast('使用指南🔖\n\n发现 - 更新 - 点击"🔰 使用指南" - 查看')

// 收藏标签
let likeTags = getFromCacheObject("likeTags")
if (likeTags && likeTags.length >= 1) {
    likeTags.forEach(tag => {
        let tagLink = {}
        tagLink[tag] = `${urlSearchNovel(tag, "{{page}}")}`
        likeTagLinks.push(tagLink)
    })
    li = li.concat(likeTagLinks)
}

// 他人收藏
let likeAuthors = getFromCacheMap("likeAuthors")
if (likeAuthors.size > 0) {
    likeAuthors.forEach((authorName, authorId) => {
        let bookmark = {}
        bookmark[authorName] = urlUserBookmarks(authorId)
        othersBookmarks.push(bookmark)
    })
    li = li.concat(othersBookmarks)
}

// 书源相关
li = li.concat(source)

// 添加格式
li.forEach(item => {
    item.title = Object.keys(item)[0]
    item.url = Object.values(item)[0]
    if (item.url.includes("https://www.pixiv.net")) item.url = urlIP(item.url)
    delete item[Object.keys(item)[0]]
    item.style = {}
    item.style.layout_flexGrow = 1
    item.style.layout_flexShrink = 1
    item.style.layout_alignSelf = "auto"
    item.style.layout_wrapBefore = "false"
    if (item.url === "") {
        item.style.layout_flexBasisPercent = 1
    } else {
        item.style.layout_flexBasisPercent = -1
    }
})

JSON.stringify(li)

🚫 屏蔽作者(本地)：
▶️设置方法：打开小说 - 菜单 - 登录 - 🚫 屏蔽作者

🚫 屏蔽标签/描述(本地)：
1️⃣编辑书源：菜单 - 登录 - 点击【 👀 查看屏蔽】
2️⃣切换列表：点击按钮，切换至【相应屏蔽列表】
3️⃣输入内容：在【输入内容】处输入屏蔽内容
4️⃣屏蔽作者：点击【🚫 加入屏蔽】，屏蔽该内容

📌 喜欢标签(本地)：
1️⃣编辑书源：菜单 - 登录 ，找到输入内容
2️⃣输入内容：输入标签，点击【📌 喜欢标签】

❤️ 查看他人收藏：
1️⃣编辑书源：菜单 - 登录 ，找到输入内容
2️⃣输入内容：输入作者ID，点击【❤️ 他人收藏】


⚙️ 书源设置：
设置1️⃣：打开小说 - 菜单 - 登录 - 点击下方按钮
▶️ 搜索任意小说，同步设置数据

设置2️⃣：编辑书源 - 基本 - 变量说明 - 修改并保存
⚙️ 自定义设置：将 true 改为 false，或相反
⚠️ 设置源变量【无法】更改书源自定义设置
⚠️ 注意不要添加或删除尾随逗号","
⚠️ 更新发现页需要长按"Pixiv"，手动刷新
以下内容为书源设置：
{
"SHOW_GENERAL_NEW": false,
"SHOW_GENERAL_RANK": false,
"SHOW_R18_GENRE": false,
"SHOW_GENERAL_GENRE": false
}

// SHOW_GENERAL_NEW
// 发现：最新、企划、约稿显示一般小说
// SHOW_GENERAL_RANK
// 发现：排行榜显示一般小说
// SHOW_R18_GENRE
// 发现：热门分类显示R18小说
// SHOW_GENERAL_GENRE
// 发现：热门分类显示一般小说

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var url = source.key
//处理强制登录
var nn = String(cookie.getCookie(url));
var coks = nn.split('; '); 
ckk = coks.filter(item => !item 
.startsWith("lf_reader_num")).join('; ');
cookie.setCookie(url,ckk);

//自动处理验证
let text;
if (src.includes("滑动验证")) {
   let headers = {
        "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 9) Mobile Safari/537.36",
        "Referer": baseUrl
    };
    try {
        let s = src.match(/src=\"(\/huadong[^"]+)/)[1];
        let sr = java.get(source.key + s, headers).body().match(/(key=\".+?value=\"[^;]+?\;)/)[1];
        eval(sr);
        let va = getval(value);
        let codeul = url + `/a20be899_96a6_40b2_88ba_32f1f75f1552_yanzheng_huadong.php?type=ad82060c2e67cc7e2cc47552a4fc1242&key=${key}&value=${va}`;
        let ck = java.get(codeul, headers);
        java.log("验证Cookie" + JSON.stringify(ck.cookies()));
        java.toast("检测到验证,尝试自动处理……");
        let tx = java.ajax(baseUrl);
        text = java.getString('#chapterContent@html', tx);
    } catch (error) {
        text = "自动验证失败，请重试!";
    }
} else {
    text = java.getString('#chapterContent@html', src);
}
text;
</js>

bookSourceComment: do{ t=Date();t1=Number(t.charAt(17));t2=Number(t.charAt(19));t3=Number(t.charAt(20));t4=Number(t.charAt(22));t5=Number(t.charAt(23)); n=(t2+t4)%6*1000+t1*100+t3*10+t5; n=2302 n=2189 r=java.ajax("http://m.wufazhuce.com/article/"+n.toString()); java.setContent(r); } while(r.includes("404 Not Found")); //获取4个随机数其中第一个数小于6，大于5918无内容，并访问网址 chapter.title=java.getString('class.text-title@text'); //传出标题 result=java.getString('class.text-content@html'); java.log("🍊🍊"+result); //获取正文内容 if(String(result).includes("'').join("\n"); java.log("🍊")} //判断正文是否有图片并处理 book.variable+="\n﹉ID："+n+"﹉﹉\n"+result; book.variable; //n=2302纯图片 //n=2189需要处理的图片 //2026图文混合 //n=4023文本申明头

ruleContent.content: do{ t=Date();t1=Number(t.charAt(17));t2=Number(t.charAt(19));t3=Number(t.charAt(20));t4=Number(t.charAt(22));t5=Number(t.charAt(23)); //var t=new Date(); //year=t.getFullYear(); //java.log("🍊"+year); n=(t2+t4)%6*1000+t1*100+t3*10+t5; r=java.ajax("http://m.wufazhuce.com/article/"+n.toString()); java.setContent(r); } while(r.includes("404 Not Found")); //获取4个随机数其中第一个数小于6，大概大于5919无内容，并访问网址 chapter.title=java.getString('class.text-title@text'); chapter.url="http://m.wufazhuce.com/article/"+n.toString(); //传出标题 s=String(java.getString('class.text-content@html')); //获取正文内容 if(s.includes("]*src\=\"([^"]+?)(\?imageView[^"]+)?\"[^>]*>/g,'')} //判断正文是否有图片并处理 else if(s.includes("")){s=s.replace(//,"")} if(source.getVariable()<=0||source.getVariable()=="NaN"||book.variable==null){ book.variable=""; source.setVariable(39); } else{ source.setVariable(source.getVariable()-1); } book.variable+="\n★"+chapter.title+"\n"+s; book.variable;

ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
var sk=java.get("sk");
var su=source.getKey();
var so=/s.php/.test(baseUrl);
if(so){
	var bu=baseUrl.match(/^(.+)\/s.php/)[1];
if(bu!=su){
	source.setVariable(bu);
//	java.toast("地址变动，重新搜索加载！")
	result=java.ajax(baseUrl+`,{
		"body": "s=${String(sk)}",
		"method": "POST"}`);
		}
	}else{result=result}
	result;
</js>
.bd li

ruleSearch.author: a@ownText##.*[(]|[):]|[【】].+

	}
	li;
</js>
li a

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
let data=JSON.parse(result).data
let chapterList=[]
for(var volume of data){
	chapterList.push({
		name:volume.volume_name,
		isVolume:true,
		info:volume.volume_desc
		})
		for(var chapter of volume.chapter_list){
			var isVip=chapter.chapter_ispay==0?"":"💰"
			var time=java.timeFormat(chapter.chapter_time*1000)
			chapterList.push({
				name:isVip+chapter.chapter_name,
				isVolume:false,
				info:`更新时间:`+time+` 字数:${chapter.chapter_number}`,
				url:`/api/readWithEncrypt?chapter_id=${chapter.chapter_id}&nid=${chapter.chapter_nid}&preload=0`
				})
			}
	}
chapterList
</js>

p@font[size="3"]@html||p@font[size="4"]@html||.content.0@html result=result.replace(//g,'').replace(/.+<\/p>|

.+<\/p>/g,'').replace(/

相关内容<\/h3>|

无相关新闻<\/p>/g,'').replace(//g,'') result+="🚫"

ruleSearch.author: $.author##.*\| ([^\|]+)\| \[.*\]##$1
ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
var data=[]
list=java.getElements('.g')
c=java.getElements('.content')
for(i=0;i<list.length;i++){
	text=list[i].select('a').text()
	href=list[i].select('a').attr('href')
	author=list[i].select('font').text()
	desc=c[i].text()
	data.push(JSON.stringify({
		text,href,desc,author
	}))
}
data
</js>

bookSourceComment:
网站外观看着和 69书吧 挺像，但实际网页结构元素什么的不一样（69好书是完全一样，规则都可以通用），估计是个蹭名字的？不过我找了几本连载的书看了下正文内容倒是基本一样，可能是爬的 69书吧？所以也不必在乎是真是假了，能用就行（毕竟能直连又没人机验证，当个平替也不错~
另外，该网站默认是繁体的，网页加载完成后会执行 JS 根据浏览器语言转为简体，但书源是需要手动转的，不过我也看了，这网站默认的繁体其实也是直接机器简繁转换的（毕竟这些小说本身都是简体发布的），所以转换回来后就和小说本身内容一样了。

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
var JsDom = Packages.org.jsoup.Jsoup;
var Document = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Document;
var Element = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Element;
            
var document = JsDom.parse(src);
            
// 获取包含<li>元素的<div>元素
var divs = document.select('ul.list > div');

// 将divs转换为数组以便排序
var divArray = [];
for (var i = 0; i < divs.size(); i++) {
    divArray.push(divs.get(i));
}

// 按照data-id属性对divArray进行排序
divArray.sort(function(a, b) {
    var pageA = parseInt(a.attr('data-id'), 10);
    var pageB = parseInt(b.attr('data-id'), 10);
    return pageA - pageB;
});

var list = [];
// 遍历排序后的divArray
for (var i = 0; i < divArray.length; i++) {
    var div = divArray[i];
    var dataId = div.attr('data-id');
    // 获取当前div下的所有<li>元素
    var lis = div.select('li');
    for (var j = 0; j < lis.size(); j++) {
        var li = lis.get(j);
        var a = li.select('a').first();
        if (a != null) {
            list.push({
                text: a.text(),
                id: dataId, // 使用data-id属性
                url: a.attr('href')
            });
        }
    }
}

//java.log(JSON.stringify(list));
list;
</js>

tocRule.chapterList:
<js>
var JsDom = Packages.org.jsoup.Jsoup;
var Document = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Document;
var Element = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Element;
            
var document = JsDom.parse(src);
            
// 获取包含<li>元素的<div>元素
var divs = document.select('ul.list > div');

// 将divs转换为数组以便排序
var divArray = [];
for (var i = 0; i < divs.size(); i++) {
    divArray.push(divs.get(i));
}

// 按照data-id属性对divArray进行排序
divArray.sort(function(a, b) {
    var pageA = parseInt(a.attr('data-id'), 10);
    var pageB = parseInt(b.attr('data-id'), 10);
    return pageA - pageB;
});

var list = [];
// 遍历排序后的divArray
for (var i = 0; i < divArray.length; i++) {
    var div = divArray[i];
    var dataId = div.attr('data-id');
    // 获取当前div下的所有<li>元素
    var lis = div.select('li');
    for (var j = 0; j < lis.size(); j++) {
        var li = lis.get(j);
        var a = li.select('a').first();
        if (a != null) {
            list.push({
                text: a.text(),
                id: dataId, // 使用data-id属性
                url: a.attr('href')
            });
        }
    }
}

//java.log(JSON.stringify(list));
list;
</js>

ruleBookInfo.kind: <js>let data = JSON.parse(src).page; let tag; switch(data.status){case 0: tag = "完结";break;case 4: tag = "完结";break;case 1: tag = "连载中";break;case -1: tag = "已断更";break;default: tag =  "已下架";} let tags = JSON.parse(data.categoryV2); tags = tags.map((t) => {return t.Name}); tags.unshift(tag); tags</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
  let defaultVariable = {
    "volume": {
      "status": false,
      "mode": 1,
      "spacer": " | ",
      "emptyVolumeName": {
        "action": false,
        "replace": "第一卷：默认"
      },
      "onlyOneShow": false
    }
  }
  let variable = (book.getVariable("custom") != "" && book.getVariable("custom") != null) ? book.getVariable("custom") : source.getVariable();
  if(variable != "" && variable != null){
    try{
      variable = JSON.parse(variable);
    } catch(err) {
      java.log(err);
      variable = defaultVariable;
    }
  } else {
    variable = defaultVariable;
  }
  let data = JSON.parse(result).data;
  let list = data.chapterListWithVolume;
  let volume = data.volumeNameList;
  let chapters = [];
  let volume_names = [];
  for(let i in list){
    for(let x in list[i]){
      let c = list[i][x];
      if(variable.volume.status == true && variable.volume.mode == 1 && volume_names.indexOf(c.volume_name) == -1){
        volume_names.push(c.volume_name);
        if(volume.length != 1 || variable.volume.onlyOneShow){
          chapters.push({
            title: ((c.volume_name == "" && variable.volume.emptyVolumeName.action == "replace" && variable.volume.emptyVolumeName.replace) ? variable.volume.emptyVolumeName.replace : c.volume_name),
            isVolume: true
          });
        }
      }
      if(variable.volume.status == true && variable.volume.mode == 2){
        if(c.volume_name == "" && variable.volume.emptyVolumeName.action == "replace" && variable.volume.emptyVolumeName.replace){
          c.title = (c.volume_name == "" ? variable.volume.emptyVolumeName.replace : c.volume_name) + (variable.volume.spacer || " | ") + c.title;
        } else if(volume.length != 1 || variable.volume.onlyOneShow){
          c.title = c.volume_name + (variable.volume.spacer || " | ") + c.title;
        }
      }
      c.url  = `https://fanqienovel.com/reader/${c.itemId}?enter_from=page&force_mobile=0`;
      chapters.push(c);
    }
  }
  chapters
</js>

loginUrl:
<js>
function login(){
userInfo=source.getLoginInfoMap()
java.log(userInfo)
UNE=userInfo['手机号码/邮箱号']
PWD=userInfo['密码']
url="{{source.getKey()}}/api/passport/login,";
SU=source.getKey()
body={
  "account": String(UNE),
  "password": String(PWD),
  "mp_token": -1
}
option={
'method': 'POST',
'body': JSON.stringify(body)
}

url=url+JSON.stringify(option)
token=java.ajax(url).match(/"auth_token":"([^"]+)"/)[1]

Cookie={
	"Cookie":"auth_token="+token
	}
header = JSON.stringify(Cookie)
source.putLoginHeader(header)
}
</js>

ruleContent.content:
if(baseUrl.match(/album-info/)){ if(book.durChapterIndex === chapter.index){ url = "legado://import/addToBookshelf?src="+baseUrl; script = `data:text/html;charset=utf-8, 《${title}》加入书架

简介：${JSON.parse(result).data.album.content}

跳转加入书架

`; java.startBrowser(script,"《"+book.title+"》") } text="❗️刷新本章节，跳转本书详情页\n"+'简介：'+JSON.parse(result).data.album.content+"\n"+'' }else if(baseUrl.match(/post_id/)){ json=JSON.parse(result) pics=json.data.post.pics; video=json.data.post.video?"视频链接："+json.data.post.video:"" preview_text=json.data.post.preview_text?json.data.post.preview_text:"" imgs=""; for(i in pics){ imgs+='\n' } result=json.data.post.content+imgs+video; result!=""?result:preview_text+"\n💰"+json.data.post.min_price+"\n"+json.data.post.has_right_errMsg }else{ result="↓↓复制下面文字，编辑书源，添加至发现规则↓↓\n"+book.name+"的作品集::"+baseUrl.replace(/page=1/,'page={\{page}}') } ##class="fr-fic fr-dib".*?"\[object Object\]"

<js>
  //showjname设置章节名显示卷名true or false
  let obj = {showjname: false}
  let $ = JSON.parse(String(result))
  let array = []
  $.volumes.forEach((booklet) => {
  	  java.put('jname',booklet.name)
    array.push({ 
    	    name:'◆◇'+String(booklet.name)+'◇◆',
    	    voltype:true
    	 })
    booklet.chapters.forEach((chapter) => {
href='http://api.ieasou.com/api/bookapp/chargeChapter.m?a=1&autoBuy=0&cid=eef_easou_book&version=002&os=android&udid=1c5b2618a57a0848e2510649dc1e03896f462284&appverion=1122&ch=blf1298_12337_001&session_id=-nEvkqSq_9ZyORN5OoVOOzJ&dzh=1&scp=0&appid=10001&utype=0&rtype=3&pushid=f97b7f81a269472c07708277b7c40b4f&ptype=5&gender=0&userInitPay=3&birt=1658424532472&instime=1658424529924&instId=1658424529924&chType=3&bidType=0&recSw=1&appType=0&gid='+java.get('gid')+'&nid='+chapter.nid+'&sort='+chapter.sort+'&gsort=0&sgsort=0&sequence=4&chapter_name='+chapter.chapter_name
      array.push({
        name: !java.get('jname')?chapter.chapter_name:((obj.showjname?'※'+java.get('jname')+'※ ':'').padStart(3,''))+chapter.chapter_name,
        url: href,
        time:"本章字数:"+String(chapter.wordCount)+"字",
        voltype:false
      })
    })
  })
  array
</js>

loginUrl:
<js>
  function login() {
  	 const user = String(source.getLoginInfoMap().get("账号"))
    const pw = String(source.getLoginInfoMap().get("密码"))
    let sign = java.md5Encode(`isDevice=Android&password=${pw}&phone=${user}&regDevice=2&key=87ac02d392a8d3566fe7748c8de00af3&secrect=57dcuidu8aa8062bfe8042ea65310669`).toString().toUpperCase()
    let data = JSON.stringify({
      isDevice: "Android",
      password: pw,
      phone: user,
      regDevice: "2",
      sign: sign
    })
    let op = JSON.stringify({
      method: "POST",
      body: data
    })
    let res = java.ajax(`https://api.shaoniandream.com/Login/login,${op}`)
    let $ = JSON.parse(res)
    if($.status != 1) java.toast($.msg)
    java.put("uid",$.data.id)
    source.putLoginHeader(JSON.stringify({
      logintoken: $.data.logintoken
    }))
  	}
</js>

</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
  let $ = JSON.parse(result)
  let uid = java.get("uid") != "undefined" ? java.get("uid") : "-1"
  let array = []
  $.data.chapterList.forEach((booklet) => {
    array.push({
    	 name: booklet.title,
    	 isv: true
    })
    booklet.chapterList.forEach((chapter) => {
    	 let sign = java.md5Encode(`BookID=${$.data.id}&UserID=${uid}&chapter_id=${chapter.id}&isDevice=Android&isMarket=true&regDevice=2&key=87ac02d392a8d3566fe7748c8de00af3&secrect=57dcuidu8aa8062bfe8042ea65310669`).toString().toUpperCase()
    	 let data = JSON.stringify({
    	   BookID: $.data.id,
    	   UserID: uid,
    	   chapter_id: chapter.id,
    	   isDevice: "Android",
    	   isMarket:"true",
    	   regDevice: "2",
    	   sign: sign
    	 })
      let op = JSON.stringify({
        method: "POST",
        body: data
      })
      array.push({
        name: chapter.title,
        url: "https://api.shaoniandream.com/Booklibrary/readchapter," + op,
        time: java.timeFormat(chapter.release_time_now * 1000),
        vip: chapter.isFree == 1,
        buy: chapter.lock == 1
      })
    })
  })
  array
</js>

ruleContent.content: let $ = JSON.parse(result) let content = $.data.show_content.map((item)=>{ return java.base64Decode(item.content) }).join("\n").trim() let img = $.data.chapterpic.map((item)=>{ return `` }).join("\n").trim() let miaoshu = java.base64Decode($.data.miaoshu) let txt = "" if(miaoshu != "") txt = `${content}\n${img}\n作者有话说：\n${miaoshu}` else txt = `${content}\n${img}` txt

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
var data = JSON.parse(result).data;
var pageCount = Math.ceil(data.total/10) || 1;
var list = Array.from(Array(pageCount).keys());
for(var i = 0; i <pageCount; i++){
  var index = list[i]+1;
  list[i] = {title:'第00' + index +'页', url: baseUrl.split('&')[0] + '&type=all&page=' + index + '&pageSize=10&sort_field=create_time&sort_value=desc'};
}
list;
</js>

需登录
◎搜索格式◎
1、搜索用户<关闭精确搜索>
@用户名
2、搜索合集<关闭精确搜索>
#合集
3、搜索粮单
%粮单名<关闭精确搜索>
4、搜索文章，直接搜索

发现规则格式
                                    🏷标签
标签名::https://api.lofter.com/oldapi/tagPosts.api?product=lofter-android-6.13.0&method=newTagSearch&offset={{(page-1) *22}}&limit=22&firstpermalink=null&tag=标签名&type=new,{"method": "POST","body":"null"}
📃用户（搜索可以得到)
部分目录章节比较多，加载时间久，出现目录加载失败，请尝试刷新，因为可能是请求失败导致的
header:
{
"Content-Type": "application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8"}

ruleBookInfo.author: $.response.blogInfo.blogNickName||$.response.posts[0].post.blogInfo.blogNickName||$.data.blogInfo.blogNickName
ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
try{
cookie = cookie.getCookie("https://newsmiss.lofter.com");

lofter = String(cookie).match(/;\s(LOFTER-[^-]+-LOGIN-AUTH)=(.*?);/);

header = {};
header[lofter[1]] = lofter[2];
source.putLoginHeader(JSON.stringify(header));
result;
}catch(e){
	result = result
	}
</js>
ruleBookInfo.name: $.response.collection.name

ruleContent.content:
if(/\.mp4/.test(baseUrl)){ result = "请点击章节链接观看视频\n视频链接："+baseUrl }else{ content = java.getString("$..content"); imgs = eval(String(java.getString("$..photoLinks"))); video =/video_down_url\\":\\"(.*?)\\"/.test(result)? "视频链接："+String(result).match(/video_down_url\\":\\"(.*?)\\"/)[1]:""; img = ""; imgs?imgs.forEach(x=>{ x?img += "\n":"" }):""; g= (/myReturnGift/.test(baseUrl)&&/[\u4e00-\u9fa5]/.test(content))?"🏷 彩蛋 "+java.getString("$..promotion")+"\n":""; result = g+ content + "\n"+img+"\n"+video; if(video && (chapter.index == book.durChapterIndex)){ java.startBrowser(video.replace(/视频链接：/,''),"内容"); result = "❗️刷新本章节播放视频❗️"+result; } } if(result =="\n\n")result = "{{$..msg}}"; result ##tbc\.##

ruleContent.nextContentUrl:
<js>
if(!/myReturnGift/.test(baseUrl)){
try{
		id = java.getString("$..post.id");
		id2 = java.getString("$..post.blogId");
url ="https://api.lofter.com/v1.1/trade/gift/post/newSupportInfo?postId="+id+"&blogId="+id2+"&openFansVipPlan=0&vipFans=0";
//java.log(JSON.parse(String(java.ajax(url))).code)
	$  = JSON.parse(String(java.ajax(url)));
//	java.log(JSON.stringify($))
	l = $.data.gainReturnGifts.length?$.data.gainReturnGifts:$.data.returnGifts;
	ls = []
	l.forEach(x=>{
		url = "https://api.lofter.com/v1.1/trade/gift/myReturnGift?id="+x.id+"&postId="+id+"&blogId="+id2;
		ls.push(url)
		})
	result = ls
	}catch(e){
		}
	}
</js>

ruleToc.nextTocUrl:
<js>
list=[];
if(/limit=500/.test(baseUrl)){
pages=java.get("page");
page=parseInt(pages/500);
url=String(java.get("url"));
if(page>6){
page=6
}else{page=page}
for(i=1;i<=page;i++){
list.push(url.replace(/offset=\d+/,'offset='+(parseInt(i)*500)))
}
}else if(/api-grain/.test(baseUrl)){
	offset = "{{$.data.offset}}";
	if(offset!="-1"){
	list = baseUrl.replace(/offset=\d+/,'offset='+offset);
}
	}
list
</js>

bookSourceComment:
注：by_distance，酷安@Distance远方   2023-10-29
1.网页接口与app接口相结合，正文获取更稳定
2.❗预下载章数建议调为4以下，不要频繁访问
3.发现规则和部分规则参考其他大佬（@关耳）等制作，其余由本人修改
4.登录后能够获取加入书架的书籍
5.登录里面填入网页抓包的token可看自己购买的vip章节
6.可选择开启作者有话说，1为开启
7.可选择开启正文延迟，10s延迟，缓存书籍用得上
2024-10-17
重构，直接填账号密码进行登录。

if(/process=2/.test(baseUrl)){

			s = s.replace(/◎◎.*/,'')
			}
			}

	ck = s.match(/(.*)/)[1];

	result = java.ajax(s);
	u = "https://m.gongzicp.com/webapi/novel/novelList?tid=17&process=2&number=0&sell=1&pre="+JSON.parse(result).data.previous_val+"&lnid="+JSON.parse(result).data.latest_nid;
	source.setVariable(ck+"\n◎◎"+u);
	
	}



//在下面来获取我的书架

var u = t.code
if (t.code===9996){
let z = source.getLoginHeader()
check_token()

Map = Map==null?{"ck":""}:Map;
let ck = Map["ck"];
let token = Map["token"]

	"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/117.0.0.0 Safari/537.36",

	"token":token
}

}

ruleBookInfo.author: $.introinfo.book.author
ruleBookInfo.lastChapter:
{{$.introinfo.book.lastChapterName##正文卷.|正文.|VIP卷.|默认卷.|卷_|VIP章节.|免费章节.|章节目录.|最新章节.|[\(（【].*?[求含理更谢乐发推票盟补加字].*?[】）\)]}}•{{$.chapinfo.lastChapterUpdateTime##\s.*}}
@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3

@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
var data = JSON.parse(result).data;
var pageSize = data.comments.length;
var pageCount = Math.ceil(data.total/pageSize) || 1; // NaN
var list = Array.from(Array(pageCount).keys());
for(var i = 0; i <(pageCount>2 ? 2 : pageCount); i++){
  var index = list[i]+1;
  list[i] = {title:'第00' + index +'页', url: baseUrl.split('?')[0] + '?type=&page=' + index + '&t='+Date.now()};
}
list;
</js>

<js>
try{
result = String(result);
!/\.html/.test(result)?result.match(/class="\\"g\\"" .*?="\\"[a-zA-Z\d\+=/]+\\"" .*?="(.*?)"/)[1]:java.getString("@@data-real||text");
}catch(e){
	java.log(e);
	result = result.match(/class="\\"g\\"" .*?="(.*?)" .*?="\\"[a-zA-Z\d\+=/]+\\""/)[1]
	}
</js>

@js:result

ruleContent.content:
<js>
match=result.match(/d\(".+"[^"]+".+"\)/)
function d(a, b){
	b = java.md5Encode(b)
	iv = b.substring(0, 16)
	key = b.substring(16)
	Cipher=java.createSymmetricCrypto("AES/CBC/PKCS7Padding" ,key,iv)
	return Cipher.decryptStr(a)}
eval(match[0])
</js>

function d(a, b){
	b = java.md5Encode(b)
	iv = b.substring(0, 16)
	key = b.substring(16)
	Cipher=java.createSymmetricCrypto("AES/CBC/PKCS7Padding" ,key,iv)
	return Cipher.decryptStr(a)}
eval(match[0])
</js>

loginUrl:
<js>
function browserLogin() {
  try {
    java.startBrowserAwait(
      "https://qidian.com", 
      "登录"
    )
  } catch (e) {}
  let ywkey = cookie.getKey("qidian.com", "ywkey")
  let ywguid = cookie.getKey("qidian.com", "ywguid")
  putLoginHeader({
  	  guid: ywguid,
  	  key: ywkey
  })
  cookie.removeCookie("qidian.com")
  // java.toast("没做完:(")
}

function login() {}

function tokenLogin() {
  if (source.getLoginInfoMap() == null) {
    java.toast("未获取到LoginInfoMap，请尝试重新打开登录UI再按一遍")
  }
  putLoginHeader({
    guid: source.getLoginInfoMap()["ywguid"],
    key: source.getLoginInfoMap()["ywkey"]
  })
  java.toast("凭据保存成功")
}

function proxyExcWrapper(fun) {
  try {
    fun()
  } catch (e) {
    java.log(e.toString() + "\n" + e.stack)
  }
}

function empty() {
  java.toast("别点了，用来看的")
}
</js>

ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
var Regs = [/bookId=(\d+)/i, /\.com\D+?\/(\d+)/i, /(\d+)/i];
var bookId = "";
for (let Reg of Regs) {
    let mat = baseUrl.match(Reg);
    if (mat) {
        bookId = mat[1];
        break;
    }
}
java.ajax(QDSign("v2/bookdetail/get", [
    "bookId=" + bookId
]))
</js>

ruleContent.content: let info = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result)) let content = "" let header = getLoginHeader() switch (info.source) { case "qd": let bid = java.hexDecodeToString(java.ajax(book.tocUrl)) let cid = info.cid if (info.isVip) { let url = `https://ksapp.qidian.com/ajax/chapter/getInfo?debug=1&bookId=${bid}&chapterId=${cid}&_csrfToken,` + JSON.stringify({ headers: { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 8.1.0; MI PAD 4 Build/OPM1.171019.019; wv) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/4.0 Chrome/90.0.4430.226 KsWebView/1.8.90.612 (rel) Safari/537.36 NetType/wifi Language/zh miniProgram/1.60.0 KUAISHOU/11.5.30.31599 aegon/3.32.2', Connection: 'Keep-Alive', 'platformType': 'android', Referer: 'https://miniapi.ksapisrv.com/', 'content-type': 'application/json', Cookie: `ywguid=${header.guid}; ywkey=${header.key}` } }) let body = JSON.parse(java.log(java.ajax(url))).data let user = body.user body = body.chapterInfo content = body.content if (body.vipStatus && !body.limitFree && !body.isBuy) { content += ("\n=============\n试读结束，继续阅读请 [购买]\n本章价格: " + body.price + "点") } } else { let request = QDSign("v2/bookcontent/safegetcontent", [ "bookId=" + bid, "chapterId=" + cid ], "", true) let body = getBytes(request.url, request.headers) let decrypt = dContentQD(cid, body) let raw = JSON.parse(decrypt) let cArr = raw.Content.split("\r\n") let blocks = {} for (let i of raw.Blocks) { blocks[i.Sort] = i } for (let i = 0; i < cArr.length; i++) { content += cArr[i] + "\n" if (blocks[i + 1] && blocks[i + 1].Type == "image") content += `\n` } } } content
